caveats: The raw Pixal3D mesh remains a high-polygon research candidate and requires the normal LOD gate before Unreal import.
decisions.notes: Multiview evidence shows a straight top-view body axis, head aligned with the torso, four usable limbs, grounded paws, coherent standard-tricolor texture, one attached tail, and no large holes.
